lemmas.primary_translation: musical interval / fiddle string / fencing thrust

definitions.text: i musikk: intervall på tre tonetrinn
definitions.translation: in: interval of three scale steps

definitions.text: i musikk: tredje tonetrinn i diatonisk skala
definitions.translation: in: third scale step in a diatonic scale
the highest of three scale steps

definitions.text: nest dypeste streng på en fele
definitions.translation: second deepest string on a fiddle

definitions.text: i fekting: hogg eller støt i høyde med ansiktet mot motstanderens høyre side
definitions.translation: in fencing: a thrust at face level towards the opponent's right side
